channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 5 Fitness Trackers That Don't Lock Core Features Behind a Monthly Subscription
item.description: The Fitbit Air isn't the only Whoop alternative that you can buy without a subscription.

item.title: Mistral renomme Le Chat en Vibe : adieu le clin d’œil français
item.description: Mistral AI renomme son chatbot Le Chat en Vibe, avec trois modes, Chat, Work, Code, et une ambition assumée : jouer dans la même cour que ChatGPT, Gemini et Claude.

item.title: Honor casse le prix de sa montre connectée aux airs d’Apple Watch et offre des écouteurs sans fil
item.description: Discrète et légère, la Honor Watch 2i ira à tous les poignets et s'accordera avec toutes les tenues estivales. En ce moment, elle est à découvrir sur le site de Honor à 79,90 euros et elle s'accompagne d'une paire d'écouteurs sans fil.

item.title: How one founder’s bet on ‘the old school web’ is paying off
item.description: Craig Campbell walked away from the river of investor money flowing into AI to create, of all things, a website. Sure, Campbell probably could have started an AI company. He's a former engineer at Meta and an experienced tech founder who in 2022 sold his last venture - an e-commerce tool for businesses that use […]

item.title: AI grifters are creating fake Black people to sell Shein junk
item.description: Aliyah, a light-skinned Black woman dressed in country-western gear, is struggling to sell metal buckles she handmade on TikTok. In a video for the social media platform from March, she cries to the camera and pleads for views: "Even as a black woman, I have more faith that white women will stay 13 seconds [on […]

item.title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
item.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

item.title: This $300 pizza oven can easily help elevate your summer pizza nights
item.description: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is aimed at people who want delicious pizza nights without having to deal with things like propane or wood pellets, unlike many other pizza ovens.

item.title: TikTok’s road to becoming a super app
item.description: TikTok may be working to become the app that people use for most of their digital activities.

item.title: How to watch Champions League Final 2026: Free streams, TV channels for PSG vs Arsenal
item.description: All the ways to watch Champions League Final 2026 live streams online – including for FREE – with Arsenal vs PSG set to light up Puskas Arena, Budapest.

item.title: Star Wars: Starfighter — release date, confirmed cast, and everything else we know about Lucasfilm's new sci-fi movie
item.description: Here's what we know so far about Star Wars: Starfighter ahead of its mid-2027 debut.

item.title: Backrooms is a reminder that the internet is the future of cinema
item.description: Backrooms is a wild ride, and it's yet another example of how many great directors are coming from the internet

item.title: Meta's employee mouse tracking program could reportedly violate EU privacy laws
item.description: Meta's mouse tracking tool for employees could capture non-US data and could violate the EU's privacy rules, according to Reuters.

item.title: On a trouvé la Nintendo Switch 2 à un tarif inédit grâce à cette offre Fnac
item.description: Disponible habituellement au tarif de 429 euros, la Nintendo Switch 2 s’offre une très belle baisse de prix chez Fnac. Pour les adhérents de l’enseigne, la toute nouvelle console hybride passe temporairement à 359 euros.

item.title: Tesla FSD : l’enquête accablante qui pourrait remettre en question le déploiement européen
item.description: Sept annotateurs Tesla sur neuf refusent de monter dans une voiture pilotée par le logiciel qu'ils ont eux-mêmes contribué à entraîner. Le timing est cruel : l'Europe teste la conduite autonome de Musk, pays par pays.

item.title: Acer Nitro Blaze Link : le PlayStation Portal du monde PC est là
item.description: Au Computex 2026, Acer annonce la Nitro Blaze Link, une console portable qui ne joue à rien toute seule. Elle sert uniquement à relayer les parties d'un PC gaming, à la façon du PlayStation Portal de Sony.

item.title: Microsoft corrige un irritant vieux de dix ans sur la webcam Windows
item.description: Votre webcam bloquée par Teams pendant que Zoom attend son tour ? Windows 11 vient d'y remédier. Il aura fallu dix ans.

item.title: ‘The very rapid development of AI/ML will also have a profound impact on the 6G design’: AI will be responsible for both creating more network traffic and strengthening network performance
item.description: Ericsson engineers explain why AI will both put 6G networks under strain and strengthen their performance at the same time, emphasizing the importance of global cooperation.

item.title: J’ai vu un gadget qui transforme votre vélo classique en vélo électrique en 10 secondes seulement
item.description: Ce kit léger à installer sur votre vélo musculaire permet de le transformer en vélo électrique. Et ce, en un rien de temps.

item.title: Une hypothèse fascinante sur l’origine des anneaux de Saturne
item.description: De nouvelles simulations renforcent une hypothèse fascinante, selon laquelle les célèbres anneaux de Saturne pourraient être les vestiges d’une ancienne lune glacée détruite par les forces gravitationnelles de la planète géante. Baptisé « Chrysalis », ce satellite disparu pourrait aussi...

item.title: Sometimes, a short game hits the spot
item.description: Slots & Daggers, a low-key, fantasy-themed slot machine roguelike, was one of my favorite games last year. That may sound like a complicated description, but the game mixes ideas from deckbuilding roguelikes with slot machines to create an engrossing loop, and there's steady meta-progression that helps you push further with just about every run. Perhaps […]...

item.title: The SpaceX IPO is great for Elon Musk and terrible for you
item.description: I haven't seen anything as stupid as the WeWork IPO document in a very long time - that is, until Elon Musk filed to take SpaceX public. WeWork was a joke. SpaceX is a threat. And if Musk and his bankers have their way, you are going to be their bagholder. Lots of the top-line […]

item.title: This is the James Bond game we’ve been waiting for
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 130, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, don't forget to hydrate, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about Victor Wembanyama and mahjong and Merlin Mann's pearls of […]

item.title: Engadget review recap: ASUS ROG Zephyrus Duo, Fitbit Air, GoPro Mission 1 and more
item.description: A roundup of recent reviews published by Engadget.

item.title: Intelligence artificielle | Le secret du succès d’Anthropic
item.description: Tasse-toi, OpenAI ! Anthropic s’en vient. En fait, Anthropic est déjà là. Avec une valorisation ajustée à 965 milliards US, à la suite d’une ronde de financement de 65 milliards US, l’entreprise qui a mis au monde Claude prend désormais la tête de la révolution par l’IA du monde des affaires.
